summary: Vertical selfie-style video of the DHS Secretary, a bearded man in a dark teal suit with a striped tie, speaking to camera in a wood-trimmed office with blue-grey walls and framed photographs. In part of the clip an overlaid picture-in-picture shows a man's face. Burned-in caption subtitles appear at the bottom (for example 'THIS GUY IS'). The audio is him describing daily DHS work against sanctuary cities and detainers placed on criminal illegal aliens.

script.scene: Bearded man in a teal suit speaks to camera in a blue-walled office; an inset picture-in-picture of a man's face appears; caption 'THIS GUY IS.'
